creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
koobs@, I am not sure about the quarterly branches: for now they all default to previous version of Ruby which did not show the problem.  I believe this problem is shown only when using Ruby 2.6.

Because when the quarterly branches will default to Ruby 2.6 leatherman will have the proper patch, I believe there is nothing more to do…  Please correct me if I am wrong :-)

Thanks!
